business_ideas.idea: Flint - luxury Duraflame alternative made from kiln-dried Canadian softwood with premium branding
Disrupting boring product categories through luxury/design (tools, hand dryers, mugs, karaoke machines)
Touchland - luxury hand sanitizer with designer collaborations sold at premium prices
Prose - personalized shampoo based on hair type analysis, $100M+ revenue recurring

predictions.text: TAM (total addressable market) is often misunderstood as static - entrepreneurs grow the pie itself
Shopify enables commerce to happen everywhere, not just e-commerce - retail is omnichannel going forward
